title: Phenomenon 9
wikitext:
{{Kauer Theme}}{{DISPLAYTITLE:Phenomenon 9: "Oneirophobia /// Tulpaefication"}} __NOTOC__
[[File:kauer.png|right|100px|link=]] '''NOTICE:''' THIS PAGE HAS BEEN DECLASSIFIED. In accordance with the policies of [[The Kauer Research Organization]], we have released the data within this file to the general public. Happy reading!
==Overview== {{Blurimage|file=slendermen.png|caption=A grainy photograph of a Tulpa, namely the "Slenderman". Instance was killed by the Dutch Expeditionary ForceA minor group of ~700, dispersed throughout around three levels and united under Dutch nationalism. shortly after the creation of this photo.}} In Tibetan Buddhism and later traditions of mysticism and the paranormal, a '''tulpa''' (plural: ''tulpae'') is a materialized being or thought-form, created through spiritual practice and intense concentration. In [[The Frontrooms|baseline reality]], they are little more than a theological concept; however, in the Backrooms, the concept of tulpae hold much more meaning. Named after the titular tulpa, '''Tulpaefication''' (Phenomenon 9) is an anomalous occurrence localized within the Backrooms, wherein collective thought and/or belief will result in the creation/modification of various constructsThis includes but is not limited to levels, entities, objects, and phenomena., often abnormal in nature. Although the anomaly cannot be properly controlled due to the circumstances involved, many have sought to use this phenomenon for their own benefit. ==Discovery & History== {{Blurimage|file=FATHER.png|caption=An artistic depiction of FATHER.}} Documentation on this phenomenon reaches back hundreds of years, with texts by no-clipped ancient Egyptians within the dimension describing tulpae resembling the various gods they worshiped (...to various extents). Similar folkloric subjects were reported to surface as instances as well, with levels resembling the Christian hell and mythological creatures such as werewolves beginning to appear throughout the Backrooms. Perhaps the most infamous of these Tulpae is '''FATHER''', a hostile and reality-bending Tulpa crudely imitating the Christian God. Due to heightened membership within the Wake Catholic ChurchA relatively disorganized group made up of catholics who no-clipped into the Backrooms., as well as heightened amount of crusades against non-Christian religions in the Backrooms (especially NymphaeaismNymphaeaism is a plural monotheist religion originated from The Backrooms, common within the Garden of Nciptheraz.) the entity manifested around the 1700s, immediately beginning to attack those it deemed "impure" via combustion. FATHER would continue its assaults upon the Backrooms until a fateful encounter with the [[The_AEG_Procedure/Overview|Crimson Wanderer]], during which after a long battle, it would be killed. Afterwards, communities affected by the Tulpa would begin to rebuild and recover, with many of the first safeguards against Tulpa propagation arising afterwards. Fast forward a few centuries to 1950; [[The Kauer Research Organization]] conducts research on the phenomena responsible for Tulpaefication, performing biological testing on the corpses of multiple deceased tulpae in order to dissect them and perform a physical examination. After these experiments and studies went on for over 20 years, the anomalies responsible for the manifestation of tulpae would finally be discovered. ==Causes== {{Blurimage|file=memnoform.png|caption=Visual representation of a psychic radiation scan's output, depicting Memnoform ID#163/375/328.}} According to current scientific knowledge, Tulpaefication (and by extension the existence of Tulpae) is caused by the interaction of the '''Achospic Plane'''A metaphysical collection of all thoughts and emotions experienced by sentient beings, composed entirely of psychic radiation and located within [[The Void]]. with microtears in reality opened by the inherent instability of the Backrooms. When [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Roth_Syndrome#Causes psychic radiation] from the Achospic Plane collides with these tears, the psychological information held by the psychic radiation takes precedent over the traditional laws of physics. In most cases, this results in nothing significant; however, in cases where these collisions occur often enough in a short period of timeThis process is greatly helped by instability in the area and/or widespread belief., reality is bent enough to allow for either the creation of a new construct, or the modification of an existing one. ==Manifestation== The manifestation of a tulpae comes in three distinct phasesThe timespan for these phases wildly vary depending on the scope of the tulpa; the process can vary from taking mere minutes to multiple decades.; the '''Gestation Phase''', the '''Growth Phase''', and '''Full Manifestation'''. During the '''Gestation Phase''', the tulpa will first begin to manifest, being entirely incorporeal in formThis can prove challenging when traversing levels newly produced by Tulpaefication.. At this stage, the Tulpa is quite weak, having not stabilized yet; fading out of the public consciousness is often enough to kill it at this point. As the tulpa matures with time, it slowly moves on to the '''Growth Phase''', where it will finally manifest in corporeal form. Although fading out of human memory will severely weaken it and cause it to eventually decay, this will not prove instantaneously fatal; if the tulpa manages to be remembered by a large enough amount of people, it will return back to normal. Finally, at the stage of '''Full Manifestation''', the Tulpae has fully matured and stabilized; belief (or lack thereof) will not kill or weaken it in any way (although some tulpae may draw from collective belief for additional strength). ==Theories== ===[[The Kauer Thesis]]=== As our organization's belief on the nature of the Backrooms states, the Backrooms may very well be a tulpa, created by this phenomenon through collective belief of those within [[The Frontrooms|baseline reality]]. Although this would provide an explanation for the dimension's mirroring of human structures, this theory does have some holes within it; there has been recovered documentation of beings [[Entity 70|predating humanity]] no-clipping into this dimension long before our time came. Although theories about a potential bootstrap paradox via temporal anomalies have been made, these remain unsubstantiated. ===God's Mind Theory=== The Nymphaeist theory on Tulpaefication states that the Achospic Plane and psychic radiation are scientific representations of the so-called "Eternal Garden," an idyllic and tranquil, infinite garden that acts as the very container of reality, housing every thought, lifeform, action, and universe into a centralized heavenscape managed by God, each piece represented by objects and nature, such as flowers, grass, and marble monoliths. The Eternal Garden is the exact container that allows reality to make sense, allowing every disordered splotch of paint to come together, crafting an ideal masterpiece. According to the Nymphaeist scripture, the Backrooms is no more than a creation of collective human thought, manifested within the mind of God Himself, and that God is unable to interfere with the affairs and workings of reality, no matter how wrong it may seem, in fear that he will break the ideality He had created.
